evidence.title: Multiselect Bouw & Infra
evidence.snippet:
# Multiselect Bouw & Infra

Multiselect Bouw & Infra is a Staffing and Recruiting company. Multiselect is a company that offers job opportunities in the construction and infrastructure sectors. They provide a wide range of job opportunities for engineers, including construction companies, engineering agencies, and government officials. They help individuals find the right job and introduce them to the clients of their choice. They offer constant opportunities for suppliers, project leaders, work managers, and experts, and welcome both individuals and companies. Multiselect Bouw & Infra employs

Algemene Voorwaarden met betrekking tot terbeschikkingstelling van arbeidskrachten, interim management, tussenkomst met zelfstandig ondernemers en werving & selectie, gedeponeerd bij de Kamer van Koophandel onder nrs. 01132603 en 01132613 respectievelijk Rijnland B.V. en Multiselect Services B.V. – handelend onder de namen: Multiselect, Rijnland B.V., Multiselect Bouw & Infra,Multiselect Bouw & Vastgoed, Multiselect Infra & Milieu, BVB bouwsupport, Multiselect Techniek,Multiselect Services B.V., Multiselect Techniek

evidence.title: Multiselect Techniek
evidence.snippet:
# Multiselect Techniek

Multiselect Techniek is a Staffing and Recruiting company. Multiselect techniek is a detacheringsbureau that focuses on technician at the mbo, hbo, and wo levels. Multiselect Techniek employs 14 people (+6.7% YoY, +1 person), founded in 1999. Headquartered in Meppel, Drenthe, Netherlands, with presence in Suriname.

## About
Multiselect Techniek is een hecht team. We streven naar korte lijnen en het persoonlijke contact met de kandidaat en de klant. Door onze ruime ervaring in de technische branche en technische arbeidsbemiddeling kunnen wij onze kandidaten en relaties

rows.limitation: Screening is point-in-time and depends on available identifiers, transliteration and dataset freshness.
rows.diligence_question: Confirm legal name, registration number, UBOs and directors before final compliance sign-off.

rows.claim: Benford analyzer route completed for Multiselect B.V. on a deterministic smoke population. Only 0 target-specific finance values were extractable, below the 30-value minimum. Route-smoke metrics: chi2=0.0282, MAD=0.0142, n=64, deviation=LOW.
rows.limitation: This verifies that the Benford analyzer path works; it is not a target-specific finance finding and cannot support a memo conclusion.
rows.diligence_question: Collect an official filing, XBRL extract, P&L export or transaction-level population before using Benford as target evidence.

rows.claim: No memo-safe register identity result is available for Multiselect B.V. because the source route failed.
rows.limitation: circuit_open: previous KVK public failure, retry in 15s
rows.diligence_question: Retry official KvK Basisprofiel/Dataservice or a verified LEI/register source before memo reliance.

rows.claim: Ownership proxy for Multiselect B.V. requires manual escalation. Triggers: Geen eigendomsdata beschikbaar bij KvK.
rows.limitation: Escalation flags are diligence routing signals, not final ownership findings.
rows.diligence_question: Which STAK, foreign-entity, missing-data or circular-ownership issue needs manual diligence before memo completion?

rows.limitation: Cache availability is not target exposure proof; combine with tech fingerprinting, asset ownership and CVE matching.

rows.diligence_question: Which target-specific module output turns this source availability into a memo-safe claim?

rows.claim: Award intelligence module is not present at the expected first-class module path.

rows.diligence_question: Rebuild award_db_builder, shadow_pl_award_bridge, award_intel_tool and seed_data before using award/gazelle claims.

rows.claim: No regulatory-register hit was found for Multiselect B.V. in the checked routes.
rows.limitation: No-hit is not proof that no regulatory exposure exists; source availability, country scope and name matching limit coverage.
rows.diligence_question: Should the target be regulated based on activity, geography, license perimeter or group structure?

rows.claim: No target-relevant adverse-media signal was found for Multiselect B.V. in the checked sources.

diligence_questions: Request asset inventory or hosting contract evidence before treating this as target exposure.
Confirm legal name, registration number, UBOs and directors before final compliance sign-off.
Are UBOs, directors and material related parties also in scope for sanctions/PEP screening?
Collect an official filing, XBRL extract, P&L export or transaction-level population before using Benford as target evidence.
Retry official KvK Basisprofiel/Dataservice or a verified LEI/register source before memo reliance.
Which STAK, foreign-entity, missing-data or circular-ownership issue needs manual diligence before memo completion?
Should the target be regulated based on activity, geography, license perimeter or group structure?
Should buyer-side diligence add local-language, paid-media or litigation searches for this sector/geography?
Which profile claims are official-source confirmed versus inferred from search/news?
Which leadership/contact records need current-role confirmation before outreach or memo use?
